# MuleSoft Google Pub/Sub Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Google Pub/Sub Connector documentation.
> See [Google Pub/Sub Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-pubsub-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Google Pub/Sub Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Google Pub/Sub Connector 1.2 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-pubsub-connector/latest/google-pubsub-connector-examples.md)
- [Google Pub/Sub Connector 1.2 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-pubsub-connector/latest/google-pubsub-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Google Pub/Sub Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-pubsub-connector/latest/google-pubsub-connector-studio.md)
- [Google Pub/Sub Connector 1.2 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-pubsub-connector/latest/google-pubsub-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Google Pub/Sub Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-pubsub-connector/latest/index.md)
